channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The record-breaking cocaine boom — and its deadly fallout
item.description: Cocaine has made a roaring comeback, and it's having some big negative effects in the U.S. and around the world.

item.title: Longtime civil rights leader the Rev. Jesse Jackson dies at 84
item.description: The Rev. Jesse Jackson was a lifelong civil rights advocate until his death Tuesday at the age of 84.

item.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson has died. And, U.S. and Iran set for high-stakes nuclear talks
item.description: Longtime civil rights leader Rev. Jesse Jackson dies at age 84. And, the U.S. and Iran are set for high-stakes negotiations today in Geneva about Iran...

item.title: India has long promised 'vibrant' border villages, as China speedily builds up
item.description: India's government launched a Vibrant Villages Programme almost four years ago. But as China steadily builds up its side, Indian residents wonder what...

item.title: Immigration crackdown in Maine is a top issue in battle for key Senate seat
item.description: President Trump's immigration policy is complicating Republicans' attempts to maintain control of Congress. A recent crackdown in Maine, for instance,...

item.title: Jesse Jackson's civil rights legacy
item.description: Civil rights activist Rev. Jesse Jackson, who marched with Martin Luther King Jr., died at 84, his family said. Antjuan Seawright, a Democratic strate...

item.title: Police identify suspect in Rhode Island ice rink shooting
item.description: Two people were killed and three others were injured at a shooting at a high school hockey game in Pawtucket.

item.title: Warner Bros. Discovery restarts takeover talks with Paramount Skydance
item.description: Warner Bros. Discovery said that Paramount Skydance is considering enhancing its buyout offer for the entertainment company.

item.title: The Rev. Jesse Jackson, who led the Civil Rights Movement for decades after King, has died at 84
item.description: Jackson was a major contributor to the Civil Rights Movement and helped it accomplish many of its goals.

item.title: US soldiers arrive in Nigeria to aid its fight against Islamist militants
item.description: The troops, who landed at an airfield in Bauchi state, will not take part in combat operations, officials say.

item.title: Nuclear talks between US and Iran end in Geneva
item.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi said the two countries had reached an understanding on the main "guiding principles", but work still needs to be...

item.title: Historian chronicles how debates that define U.S. history can help us navigate today's politics
item.description: Jon Meacham, a historian and bestselling author, discusses the state of American politics, what we can learn from U.S. history, and his latest book, "...

item.title: Russia and Ukraine set to hold talks in Geneva as another attack rocks thousands of Ukrainians
item.description: Russian and Ukrainian officials are set to hold talks in Geneva on Tuesday. This comes as thousands of Ukrainians were impacted by a Russian attack ov...

item.title: Police credit a good Samaritan for ending a deadly shooting at a Rhode Island ice rink
Ukrainians react to massive attack as Russia and Ukraine hold talks in Geneva
item.description: Ukraine sent negotiators to Geneva, Switzerland, to hold talks with their Russian counterparts as the war rages on. CBS News' Holly Williams and Elean...

item.title: France releases suspected Russian 'shadow fleet' tanker after fine paid
item.description: French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot said the vessel was departing Marseille after a payment of "several million euros".

item.title: The man whose bad break-up gave Madonna her breakthrough hit Like A Virgin
item.description: Billy Steinberg, who has died at the age of 75, co-wrote Madonna's 1984 chart-topper Like a Virgin.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie kidnapping investigators work with Walmart after identifying suspect’s backpack
